name: Credit Approval - Get Leads Approved and UnApproved

content.query:
-- jzm script nov 20 - 2023

-- Predicts great Declined and Approved
-- New script that gets the Declined Flag from two places
select count(*) from(
SELECT
    LOWER(cst.FirstName) first_name,
    LOWER(cst.LastName) last_name,
    cst.phone phone,
    cst.email email,
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(cst.Zip, ''), 'unknown')) zip,
    MONTH(lds.EntryDate) entry_month,
    YEAR(lds.EntryDate) entry_year,
    srs.SourceCode,
    CASE jbs.JobStatus WHEN 'Credit Decline' THEN 1 ELSE -1 END credit_declined,
    CASE WHEN fcj.FundedAmount > 0 THEN 1 ELSE -1 END credit_approved 
FROM
    [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job on cst.CustomerID = job.CustomerID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs on jbs.JobStatusID =  job.JobStatusID
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[FACT_JOB] fcj on fcj.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID 
    INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
WHERE lds.EntryDate BETWEEN '2017/11/30 00:00:00' AND '2023/11/30 00:00:00'
AND (jbs.JobStatus = 'Credit Decline' OR fcj.FundedAmount > 0)
AND srs.SourceCode = 'Modernize'
) alx

select count(*) from(
-- New Set for Testing
        SELECT
            cst.CustomerID cst_id,
            lds.LeadID lds_id,
            LOWER(cst.FirstName) first_name,
            LOWER(cst.LastName) last_name,
            NULLIF(CAST(cst.phone AS VARCHAR), '') phone,
            LOWER(cst.email) email,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.Address1, '')) a_address,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.City, '')) a_city,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.State, '')) a_state,
            NULLIF(CAST(cst.Zip AS VARCHAR), '') a_zip,
            MONTH(lds.EntryDate) entry_month,
            YEAR(lds.EntryDate) entry_year,
            srs.SourceCode,
            CASE WHEN (jbs.JobStatus = 'Credit Decline' OR jbs.JobStatus = 'Reject') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END credit_declined,
            CASE WHEN fcj.FinanceApproved = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END credit_approved,
            CASE WHEN jbs.JobStatus IS NULL THEN 'unknown' ELSE jbs.JobStatus END job_status
        FROM
            [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
            INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
            LEFT JOIN [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job on lds.CustomerID = job.CustomerID
            LEFT JOIN [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs on jbs.JobStatusID =  job.JobStatusID
            LEFT JOIN [EDW].[FACT_JOB] fcj on fcj.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID 
            INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
        WHERE lds.EntryDate BETWEEN '2024/01/01 00:00:00' AND '2024/03/31 00:00:00'
        AND cst.Address1 IS NOT NULL
        AND cst.email IS NOT NULL
        AND cst.FirstName IS NOT NULL
        AND cst.LastName IS NOT NULL
        AND cst.phone IS NOT NULL
) alx

 --AND srs.LeadSubSourceID IN ('MAC-2427',	'PBC-723',	'PBC-724',	'PBC-735',	'SWR-2107',	'FHI-1351',	'FHI-31',	'FHI-38',	'MAC-2365',	'MAC-45',	'MXH-2624',	'MXH-2625',	'PBC-129',	'PHI-143',	'PHI-283',	'PHI-284',	'PHI-40',	'RTW-1316',	'RTW-1728',	'SWR-2341',	'SWR-2536',	'SWR-2817',	'SWR-2818')

-- Get Training Dataset

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- DATASET FOR CREDIT APPROVAL / REJECTION (RAW_CREDIT.csv)

select count(*) from(
-- New Set for Testing
        SELECT
            cst.CustomerID cst,
            lds.LeadID,
            LOWER(cst.FirstName) first_name,
            LOWER(cst.LastName) last_name,
            NULLIF(CAST(cst.phone AS VARCHAR), '') phone, 
            LOWER(cst.email) email,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.Address1, '')) a_address,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.City, '')) a_city,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.State, '')) a_state,
            NULLIF(CAST(cst.Zip AS VARCHAR), '') a_zip,
            MONTH(lds.EntryDate) entry_month,
            YEAR(lds.EntryDate) entry_year,
            srs.SourceCode,
            CASE WHEN (jbs.JobStatus = 'Credit Decline' OR jbs.JobStatus = 'Reject') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END credit_declined,
            CASE WHEN fcj.FinanceApproved = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END credit_approved,
            CASE WHEN jbs.JobStatus IS NULL THEN 'unknown' ELSE jbs.JobStatus END job_status
        FROM
            [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
            INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
            LEFT JOIN [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job on lds.CustomerID = job.CustomerID
            LEFT JOIN [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs on jbs.JobStatusID =  job.JobStatusID
            LEFT JOIN [EDW].[FACT_JOB] fcj on fcj.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID 
            INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
        WHERE lds.EntryDate BETWEEN '2021/12/01 00:00:00' AND '2024/07/31 00:00:00'
        AND cst.Address1 IS NOT NULL
        AND cst.City IS NOT NULL
        and cst.State IS NOT NULL
        and cst.Zip IS NOT NULL 
        and lds.Division LIKE 'MXH'
        --AND srs.LeadSubSourceID IN ('MAC-2427',	'PBC-723',	'PBC-724',	'PBC-735',	'SWR-2107',	'FHI-1351',	'FHI-31',	'FHI-38',	'MAC-2365',	'MAC-45',	'MXH-2624',	'MXH-2625',	'PBC-129',	'PHI-143',	'PHI-283',	'PHI-284',	'PHI-40',	'RTW-1316',	'RTW-1728',	'SWR-2341',	'SWR-2536',	'SWR-2817',	'SWR-2818')
) alz

select top(100) * from [EDW].[fact_lead]

-- DATASET FOR APPT SET (RAW_APPSET.csv) and sales (new model)
select count(*) from(
-- New Set for Testing
        SELECT
            cst.CustomerID cst,
            lds.LeadID,
            LOWER(cst.FirstName) first_name,
            LOWER(cst.LastName) last_name,
            NULLIF(CAST(cst.phone AS VARCHAR), '') phone,
            LOWER(cst.email) email,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.Address1, '')) a_address,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.City, '')) a_city,
            LOWER(NULLIF(cst.State, '')) a_state,
            NULLIF(CAST(cst.Zip AS VARCHAR), '') a_zip,
            MONTH(lds.EntryDate) entry_month,
            YEAR(lds.EntryDate) entry_year,
            srs.SourceCode,
            fct.ApptSet,
            fct.Sold 
        FROM
            [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
            INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
            INNER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs on lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
            INNER JOIN [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] fct on lds.CustomerID = fct.CustomerID
        WHERE lds.EntryDate BETWEEN '2024/01/01 00:00:00' AND '2024/07/31 00:00:00'
        AND cst.Address1 IS NOT NULL
        AND cst.City IS NOT NULL
        and cst.State IS NOT NULL
        and cst.Zip IS NOT NULL
        and lds.Division LIKE 'MXH'
        --AND srs.LeadSubSourceID IN ('MAC-2427',	'PBC-723',	'PBC-724',	'PBC-735',	'SWR-2107',	'FHI-1351',	'FHI-31',	'FHI-38',	'MAC-2365',	'MAC-45',	'MXH-2624',	'MXH-2625',	'PBC-129',	'PHI-143',	'PHI-283',	'PHI-284',	'PHI-40',	'RTW-1316',	'RTW-1728',	'SWR-2341',	'SWR-2536',	'SWR-2817',	'SWR-2818')
) alz

SELECT top(100) * from [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
